span.p:
POST /api/assessment-links/{token}/validate-profile
(app/router/assessment_link_router.py)
목적: profile payload를 서비스로 전달

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
validate_custom_test_profile_by_access_link
(app/services/admin/assessment_links.py)
목적: 링크/검사/배정 검증 후 문항 payload 반환

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
함수 내부 순서
1) access link 조회
2) custom_test 조회
3) 배정 profile 검증
4) build_custom_assessment_question_payload 호출
5) { message, assessment_payload } 반환

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
build_custom_assessment_question_payload
(app/services/admin/assessment_links.py)
목적: profile에 맞는 실시 구간 문항 payload 조립

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
함수 내부 순서
1) test_configs 로드
2) base meta 생성
3) active variants 결정
4) variant loop
5) items/parts 조립
6) payload 반환

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
load_custom_test_configs
(app/services/admin/common.py)
목적: custom_test의 검사 구성 복원

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
test_configs 존재?
(분기 함수: build_custom_assessment_question_payload
app/services/admin/assessment_links.py)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 404 검사 구성 정보를 찾을 수 없습니다.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
_build_custom_assessment_profile_meta
(app/services/admin/assessment_links.py)
목적: 공통 메타 payload 생성

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
_resolve_active_variants
(app/services/admin/assessment_links.py)
목적: profile 기준 활성 variant 목록 선택

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
함수 내부 순서
1) test_configs loop
2) _select_sub_test_variant_for_profile 호출
3) selected_sub_test_json 추출
4) selected_scale_codes 포함해 resolved append

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
_select_sub_test_variant_for_profile
(app/services/admin/assessment_links.py)
목적: test_id 내부에서 일치 variant 1건 선택

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
_profile_matches_sub_test
(app/services/admin/assessment_links.py)
목적: sub_test 조건 JSON과 입력 profile 비교

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
일치 variant 존재?
(분기 함수: _select_sub_test_variant_for_profile
app/services/admin/assessment_links.py)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: 400 일치 구간 없음

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
variant loop 시작
(build_custom_assessment_question_payload)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
_load_question_bundle
(app/services/admin/assessment_links.py)
목적: 1개 variant의 문항/척도/보기 bundle 로드

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
함수 내부 순서
1) fetch_parent_item_bundle
2) item_json / item_meta_json / scale_struct json.loads
3) _build_item_text_and_matrix_meta
4) _parse_item_response_options
5) _parse_render_rules
6) response_key 계산

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
fetch_parent_item_bundle
(app/repositories/parent_test_repository.py)
목적: parent_item + parent_scale + parent_item_choice 조인 조회

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
row 존재?
(분기 함수: _load_question_bundle
app/services/admin/assessment_links.py)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 404 검사 원본 데이터를 찾을 수 없습니다.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
_build_item_text_and_matrix_meta
(app/services/admin/assessment_links.py)
목적: item_json을 item_map / matrix_row_meta로 정규화

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
_parse_item_response_options
(app/services/admin/assessment_links.py)
목적: item_template을 item별 response_options로 변환

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
_parse_render_rules
(app/services/admin/assessment_links.py)
목적: render_rules_json을 range rule 목록으로 변환

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
_build_variant_items_and_scales
(app/services/admin/assessment_links.py)
목적: 선택 척도 기준 문항/척도 목록 조립

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
함수 내부 순서
1) _resolve_scale_item_ids
2) selected_scales 구성
3) item_id 정렬
4) render rule / matrix meta 반영
5) item.id = TEST::SUBTEST::ITEM 생성

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
_resolve_scale_item_ids
(app/services/admin/assessment_links.py)
목적: scale_struct에서 선택 척도별 item_id 추출

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
_append_items_as_render_parts
(app/services/admin/assessment_links.py)
목적: 동일 render_type/response_options 기준 part 버퍼 조립

all_items 존재?

span.p: 실제 검사 문항 화면 표시
